How o9 Works

Chapter 5

The Logic

How the o9 planning engine turns network data into optimized, constrained supply plans.

  1. 01

    How the Planning Engine Works

    The core planning loop — from demand signal to feasible supply plan.

    5 min
  2. 02

    Constraint-Based Optimization

    How o9 balances supply, demand, and capacity constraints to generate the best possible plan.

    4 min
  3. 03

    Machine Learning & AI in o9

    Where artificial intelligence augments the planning process — from demand forecasting to decision recommendations.

    4 min
  4. 04

    Plan vs. Actuals

    How o9 compares what was planned to what actually happened — and why the gap matters.

    3 min
  5. 05

    Hierarchies & Rollups

    How o9 organizes items, locations, and time into hierarchies for aggregated planning.

    3 min
